quote: Meeting load disappeared because meeting efficiency increased.

We had a very positive experience with the comprehensive POSH services provided to Amphora across our Bangalore and Hyderabad offices. Jaya Bhavya supported us with policy vetting, employee awareness and sensitization sessions, Internal Committee (IC) capacity building, and also served as our External IC Member. She further assisted with key compliance requirements including annual POSH filings and She-Box portal registration and management. Her expertise, structured approach, and practical guidance significantly strengthened our POSH compliance framework and awareness across the organization.

I wish to express our sincere appreciation for the exceptional service provided by NexusHive Solutions regarding our POSH requirements. Your extensive subject knowledge was instrumental in guiding us through the complexities of POSH compliance. The training sessions were engaging, well-structured, and effectively tailored to our organization's specific needs. We particularly appreciated your approachable nature and interactive teaching style, which were well-received by all participants. We highly recommend NexusHive Solutions.

Bhavya doesn't just fill roles she helps you structure your business. Her expertise was a game-changer, engaging her as our Fractional CHRO she successfully shifted us from a reactive hiring mindset to a disciplined, strategic process tailored to our business needs. Her patience, deep industry insights, and ability to refine organizational roles have been invaluable. Thanks to her expertise, our organizational processes are now professional, refined, and ready for growth. I highly recommend NexusHive for any founder looking to build their team the right way.
